query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `security_events` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `eventType` ENUM('failed_login', 'account_lockout', 'rate_limit_hit', 'suspicious_activity', 'password_reset_request', 'unauthorized_access_attempt', '2fa_failed') NOT NULL,
  `userId` INT NULL,
  `ipAddress` VARCHAR(45) NULL,
  `userAgent` TEXT NULL,
  `email` VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  `endpoint` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  `details` JSON NULL,
  `severity` ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `resolved` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `resolvedBy` INT NULL,
  `resolvedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `event_type_idx` (`eventType`),
  INDEX `user_id_idx` (`userId`),
  INDEX `ip_address_idx` (`ipAddress`),
  INDEX `created_at_idx` (`createdAt`),
  INDEX `severity_idx` (`severity`),
  INDEX `resolved_idx` (`resolved`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`resolvedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3MFojkLuMTYkad4.root --database VvJGXt6mJVC6petxtZ2P78 --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `security_events` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `eventType` ENUM('failed_login', 'account_lockout', 'rate_limit_hit', 'suspicious_activity', 'password_reset_request', 'unauthorized_access_attempt', '2fa_failed') NOT NULL,
  `userId` INT NULL,
  `ipAddress` VARCHAR(45) NULL,
  `userAgent` TEXT NULL,
  `email` VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  `endpoint` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  `details` JSON NULL,
  `severity` ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `resolved` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `resolvedBy` INT NULL,
  `resolvedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `event_type_idx` (`eventType`),
  INDEX `user_id_idx` (`userId`),
  INDEX `ip_address_idx` (`ipAddress`),
  INDEX `created_at_idx` (`createdAt`),
  INDEX `severity_idx` (`severity`),
  INDEX `resolved_idx` (`resolved`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`resolvedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
